MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S Motion to Stay Action and Request For Judicial Notice. Appearances: Hilary E. Youngblood, Esq. of Davidovitz & Bennett, LLP, (415) 956-4800; appearing for California Pacific Medical Center, and moving party; There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
